creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Hi,

please update the sysutils/beadm port to latest 1.2.3 version from here:

https://github.com/vermaden/beadm/tree/1.2.3

CHANGELOG:

 - Fix dataset listing (avoid listing snapshots).
 - Implement name sanity check upon creation of new BE.
 - Avoids issues with ZFS bookmarks.
 - Add sed(1) fix for beadm mount command.


Regards,
vermaden
